reviews_list.review_title: There is good infrastructure, facilities and nice placement .

review_content.Placements: A minimum of 65 CGPA is good in my college, and all facilities are good. Top offers are provided in the courses, and top roles in the course. faqs.question: How can I get into Jagadambha Institute of Pharmacy and Research for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
Jagadambha Institute of Pharmacy and Research has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:
Courses Eligibility
B.Pharma Candidate must have studied Physics and Chemistry as compulsory subjects along with one of the Mathematics/Biology subjects with above mentioned marks in the above subjects taken together from any recognised Board/Council. The mentioned marks of SC/ST and OBC is for the candidate belonging to maharashtra State. Candidates who are appearing at the qualifying examination are also eligible. Maharashtra State candidates must have to appear for MHTCET. All India Candidates need to appear for MHTCET/NEET. However, preference shall be given to the candidate obtaining non zero positive score in NEET over the candidates who obtained non zero score in MHTCET.
D.Pharma Candidate passed 10+2 (science stream) with Physics, Chemistry and Biology or Mathematics or Any other qualification approved by the Pharmacy Council of India from any recognised institute/board are eligible to apply

A:    The overall seats available across all courses offered by Jagadambha Institute of Pharmacy and Research is up to 60. Good thing to know is that Jagadambha Institute of Pharmacy and Research has courses which are approved by prominent Government bodies like PCI.

content.Placements: The placement ratio in our college is average but not bad. content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is excellent and filled with greenery and a happy environment. In college, all facilities are available, like Wi-Fi for the library, all the equipment available for labs, properly ventilated classrooms, and separate departments. Our hostel is named Chandra Shekhar Azad Boys Hostel. In the hostel, all facilities are available for students, like Wi-Fi, a big dining area, a volleyball ground, a football ground, and a basketball ground. The food is prepared for students with fully hygienic and clean procedures by fully trained and experienced cooks.

reviews.review_heading: Very good and value for money.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is excellent and filled with greenery and a happy environment. In college, all facilities are available, like Wi-Fi for the library, all the equipment available for labs, properly ventilated classrooms, and separate departments. Our hostel is named Chandra Shekhar Azad Boys Hostel. In the hostel, all facilities are available for students, like Wi-Fi, a big dining area, a volleyball ground, a football ground, and a basketball ground. The food is prepared for stu...

reviews.review_heading: I am disappointed with the syllabus and study structure.
reviews.review_text: There are 3 labs in our department, and each lab has very good equipment. All the lab faculty members are well-educated and know how to teach students. Wi-Fi facility is also available. In the hostel, food quality is good, but the vegetables are not well-cooked. Wi-Fi is also available in the hostel. Canteen is also available for 24x7, and all the sports facility is also available.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty members and campus.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is the best in my opinion because this college is some kilometres away from the main markets, so there is no pollution. The campus is good for diploma and B.Tech courses. The college has a big library, and there are many books in the library to read. Wi-Fi facilities are available in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied because of faculty members, placements and various facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very good. Wi-Fi is available in the hostel as well as in college. Hostel facilities are not good in condition. Lunch and dinner are not good because they don't use proper spices. Classwork is also bad because the faculty members don't have the experience in any particular subject. Here anyone can teach anything without knowledge. I'm very much shocked that in professional courses. I'm facing this situation which I had never thought of it. There are no sports...

reviews.review_heading: Join ABSS institute of technology.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. It has a big building with lots of parking space and ground for playing. The basketball court, volleyball court, hostel, seminar hall and big classrooms are available. Rather it has space for the canteen, but it's not maintained well.

reviews.review_heading: Not satisfied because of the placements.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure was good but not attractive. There were 6-7 labs, 1 workshop and 1 library. There is only sports field of volleyball and the campus covers 10 acres of field. Some students play cricket but the field has not proper space for playing cricket. Campus was fully Wi-Fi but not for 24 hours. Canteen food was not great but just edible. For entertainment, there were two Led TVs.

review_summary.college_name: NITTE University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.title: Really good research-oriented environment.

content.Placements: Nearly 30 percent of students are placed in our course. The highest package of our course is 7 LPA. The average package is probably around 4.5 LPA. The lowest package is 3.5 LPA. The top recruiting companies for the course are Biocon and Merck. Almost 60 percent of the students got an internship at either industrial companies or at research centers in India.
content.Infrastructure: The Department of Biotechnology has around 5-6 labs for various subjects. Research is highly promoted to students at all academic years. Wi-Fi for both students and faculty is provided. The Department of Biotechnology also has a departmental library.

individual_reviews.title: Really good college.

content.Placements: 50 percent students are placed. 20 LPA is the highest, 2 LPA is the lowest, and 10 LPA is the average package offered for my course. Bicon, Fixar, Sipla, and some more really good companies come for placement in my course. All the students got internships because of their potential.
content.Infrastructure: All the facilities are really good, high standard, and well maintained. They clean it all, good and maintain it well. All these facilities are also really well maintained and very good for the students. It’s nice to enjoy all the things in and around the campus.

individual_reviews.title: Things you should know before joining NMAM Institute of Technology, NITTE University .

content.Placements: Around 60 percent of the students are placed, and the average salary is around 3 to 4 LPA. The top recruiting companies are IT companies, but recently companies from UAE and Dubai came to our college to recruit biotech students. It is a cold drink company, and they wanted people for it.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is great. Like the hostel rooms, washrooms, classrooms, everything is great. We have AC classrooms, and there is one big library, one library where they keep journals, one for computer, one discussion room, and we also have department library. The only bad thing is we don't get proper Wi-Fi in college or hostel. Even the food in mess is bad, but the games and sports facilities are great. There are gyms, basketball court, and football court.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Medical Imaging Technology - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The college is very good in academics and provides a high certificate value all over India.

content.Placements: Students with 75% or above in Physics, Chemistry, and Biology in higher secondary get placement. The course fee is about 4 LPA and may increase every year. Internship is provided for students for 6 months and can be extended to 1 year if interested.
content.Infrastructure: Every classroom is provided with projectors. Wi-Fi is available for all students and faculty. A high-quality library is provided and will be open even during holidays. For sports and other activities, a gym, a Zumba dance hall, a football ground, a basketball court and an indoor stadium are available. Food is good, and the mess is hygienic.

individual_reviews.course: M.Tech. in Structural Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely good for the masters.

content.Placements: Students are eligible for placements from the 3rd semester. Companies such as Atkins, Brigade, and Shoba visited the college. The highest package offered is 7 LPA. About 70 percent of students got placed. I plan to do a Ph.D. after this. The college provides internship opportunities. Stipends vary, with some being unpaid. Projects include various attributes, helping students gain hands-on experience and industry exposure from time to time as well.
content.Infrastructure: NMIT provides on-campus hostels for both boys and girls with 1689 capacity. Twin-sharing rooms are available for 1st year students. Second year onwards, boys may opt for twin-sharing or four-sharing rooms. Wi-Fi all over the campus with CCTV security. Computer labs are spacious and have a good number of PCs. Classrooms are spacious and digitally updated, and also air-conditioned. The library is good, and open till 12:00 AM.

admission_process.title: NITTE University Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: NITTE University admission 2026isentranceandmerit-based. The institute offersMBA, MBBS, MSc,and other courses at UG, PG, PG Diploma, doctoral, and fellowship level courses in the fields of Management, Engineering, Computer, and Information Technology among others. Admission to the MBA course is based on a valid score on thenational-based entrance examscore. Apart from this,NITTE Universitycourse admission forBTechisNUCAT.

NITTE University offers various undergraduate, postgraduate, diploma, PhD and fellowship courses, such asMBBS, BPharm, BSc,BDS,MBBS, MDand others. Candidates seeking admission to NITTE University courses must fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria set by the university for their desired course. Below are the eligibility and selection criteria details for some of the NITTE University courses:
Check here for detailed eligibility criteria for moreNITTE University courses
Note 1: Admission to both General and NRI category seats in MBBS is based on inter-se merit in NEET-UG

*Note 2:Candidates who are Indian nationals and have completed class 12 in India, fall under the General category. Admission to the BSc (Hons) Biomedical Science programme under the General Category is based on merit in the All India Entrance Test - NUCAT (Nitte University Common Admission Test). Candidates for NUCAT will have to complete and submit the Online NUCAT registration form available on the official website.

NITTE University fees are a sum of various components such as tuition fees, caution deposits, exam fees, etc. Some of the fee components like caution deposit are one-time paid while tuition fee is paid annually.

Coming to affordability is among the causes of many students quitting college or their degree. Note:Candidates must note that this information is sourced from the official website of the institute/university-sanctioning body and is subject to change.
The university offers over 50 courses and admission to various courses is different. The below points mentioned NITTE University course admission 2026 for a few of the top courses:
Step 1: Application
Candidates can apply on the official website of NITTE. For entrance-based courses, applicants must visit the respective exam's official website to register for the desired course exam.
Step 2: Selection
Step 3: Counselling
Selected candidates must attend the counselling for the desired course (if applicable), and complete the choice-filling process.
Step 4: Seat Allotment & Admission Confirmation

Seats will offered to the students based on their merit in the entrance exam, and choice filled during counseling. to confirm the admission, candidates must report to the campus and complete the admission formalities.

After filling out the eligibility criteria candidates are required to fill out the application form by visiting the official website of NITTE University.

faqs.question: How do I get admission to NITTE?
faqs.answer: NITTE offers a wide range of courses at UG and PG level in various streams such as Engineering, Allied Health Sciences, Pharmacy, Dentistry, Biological Sciences, etc. The mode of application in NITTE University is online. Admission to various courses are offered on the basis of merit, however, few courses are there for which candidates need to appear for the entrance exams.

faqs.question: Which entrance exam is accepted by NITTE?
faqs.answer: The university offers more than 50 courses in multiple fields. However, the eligibility criteria for MBA programme is a bachelor's degree with 50% aggregate. Candidate should beNEET-UGqualified. hostel.description: The hostellers are provided with a cot, cupboard, study table and chair. Every hostel has solar water heaters, WiFi facility, common telephone, TV room, reading room, visitors lounge, water coolers, generators, 24x7 security and surveillance cameras. AC rooms are available in some of the hostels. The hostels also have facilities for indoor and outdoor games.

library.description: The library has a collection of 82317 volumes of text (31 March, 2018) and reference books, 1300+ e-journals and 242 Technical Journals (in print) both national and international. The total area of the library is 31000sft and accommodates 750 students at a time. A well furnished Audio/Visual centre provides all sorts of self study digital sources. The digital library subscribes to numerous E-resources and provides access to VTU Consortia online journals. The e-resources can be accessed across the Wi-Fi campus. The digital library subscribes to scholar online journals from ASME, ASCE, IEEE, Elsevier Science Direct, Springer, Taylor and Francis, Proquest, and Knimbus organizations. There are 25 computer systems provided to the users on LAN. The institute library is an active member of DELNET, which is the largest network library in the Asian region.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Tennis Court, Athletic Track, Volleyball Courts, Table Tennis, Indoor Basketball Court, Throw ball Courts

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by NMAM Institute of Technology, NITTE UniversityReviewed on 22 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Really good research-oriented environment.
reviews.review_text: The Department of Biotechnology has around 5-6 labs for various subjects. Research is highly promoted to students at all academic years. Wi-Fi for both students and faculty is provided. The Department of Biotechnology also has a departmental library.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by NMAM Institute of Technology, NITTE UniversityReviewed on 21 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Really good college.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities are really good, high standard, and well maintained. They clean it all, good and maintain it well. All these facilities are also really well maintained and very good for the students. It’s nice to enjoy all the things in and around the campus.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by NMAM Institute of Technology, NITTE UniversityReviewed on 9 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Things you should know before joining NMAM Institute of Technology, NITTE University .
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is great. Like the hostel rooms, washrooms, classrooms, everything is great. We have AC classrooms, and there is one big library, one library where they keep journals, one for computer, one discussion room, and we also have department library. The only bad thing is we don't get proper Wi-Fi in college or hostel. Even the food in mess is bad, but the games and sports facilities are great. There are gyms, basketball court, and football court.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by K.S. Hegde Medical AcademyReviewed on 26 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The college is very good in academics and provides a high certificate value all over India.
reviews.review_text: Every classroom is provided with projectors. Wi-Fi is available for all students and faculty. A high-quality library is provided and will be open even during holidays. For sports and other activities, a gym, a Zumba dance hall, a football ground, a basketball court and an indoor stadium are available. Food is good, and the mess is hygienic.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by NITTE Meenakshi Institute of TechnologyReviewed on 18 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Absolutely good for the masters.
reviews.review_text: NMIT provides on-campus hostels for both boys and girls with 1689 capacity. Twin-sharing rooms are available for 1st year students. Second year onwards, boys may opt for twin-sharing or four-sharing rooms. Wi-Fi all over the campus with CCTV security. Computer labs are spacious and have a good number of PCs. Classrooms are spacious and digitally updated, and also air-conditioned. The library is good, and open till 12:00 AM.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by NMAM Institute of Technology, NITTE UniversityReviewed on 18 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Bangalore days in NMMA College.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very different, as it is built in forest areas near coastal areas, and it is full of greenery. Hostel facilities are very good compared to other hostels. We get delicious food and menu changes every month. We get to eat different dishes in a week, there are 3 days of non-vegetarian food like chicken, and another 3 days of fish.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by NMAM Institute of Technology, NITTE UniversityReviewed on 17 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: For Master's, this is a good college.
reviews.review_text: The labs and other sports facilities are up to the mark. A lot of extracurricular activities are focused on, apart from academics. There is quality and a sense of fraternity among students. Wi-Fi all over the campus with CCTV security. The hostel has the best infrastructure. Amazing facilities. Appreciable food. The cost of staying in a hostel is way less than actually renting or staying in a PG for the same facilities. The first years have restrictions on time. That is, they have to be inside b...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by NITTE Meenakshi Institute of TechnologyReviewed on 12 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is a very expensive college, but in Bangalore, it is common.
reviews.review_text: On campus, international students live in the hostel. All the students are helpful and belong to other parts of the world and the country. Mostly, 5:2 boys to girls live in the hostel campus, and there is equal respect for all. We celebrate all important functions on the hostel campus together. Classrooms are spacious and digitally updated. The hostel is good, and their mess is super. I'm sure you won't get better food at home than in the hostel.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by NITTE Meenakshi Institute of TechnologyReviewed on 10 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Please do some serious study and aim for IIT.
reviews.review_text: The library was vast with lots of books available. The classroom had projectors. We had a huge ground for sports. Clubs such as theatre club fashion club etc. Hostels were good they were mostly two seated. Mess food was average. Wi-Fi was all over the campus. There were cricket grounds volleyball court and many other grounds present.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by NITTE Meenakshi Institute of TechnologyReviewed on 17 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: I’m fortunate to be part of this institution.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms come with LED screens, a projector, and Wi-Fi. Hostels are provided with all the amenities, but students have to compromise with food. I’m a day scholar but have friends in the hostel who give mixed reviews about the hostel facilities. They have 24/7 medical support.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by NITTE Meenakshi Institute of TechnologyReviewed on 12 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: We have good faculty and placements.
reviews.review_text: The department facilities are good, and the overall infrastructure is also good. We have Wi-Fi in every classroom within the department. The library facilities are also good. The hostel is good with decent food. Rooms and washrooms are also good. There is also a ground in front of the hostel.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by NITTE Meenakshi Institute of TechnologyReviewed on 8 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and teachers.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good library. It has collection of online and offline books. We have good facilities. Good interaction is there with students. We have good football court for playing games. There is a basketball court as well for sports. It has good facilities in general. The clubs are good as well in all departments.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by NITTE Meenakshi Institute of TechnologyReviewed on 8 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: A wonderful experience in this green campus.
reviews.review_text: All the rooms are well-maintained and very hygienic. The food is good but it provides the same food every week. There is a medical center. There are various labs with high technology. There are places where students get a chance to focus on physical development. There is a gym and sports activities too.

reviews_list.review_title: Review of Academy of Pharmaceutical Sciences.

review_content.Placements: I'm a Pharma.D student. As a Pharma.D student, I can say one thing for sure that none of the graduates are unemployed. They got placed either in research, clinics, dispensaries or even in IT companies with an average salary of Rs. 30,000 per month. Since this is a medical line up, as long as the drug industry keeps developing, there are chances of employment. Though the placement cell of our college is a bit downstream in bringing in companies, the academic faculty members have proven to be the best. As Pharma.D students, we have an internship programme in the 6th year. Being under the government sector, the average stipend we get is Rs. 7,000 per month. For B. Pharma students, they offered a one-month internship in any of the pharmacies nearby with no stipend. As a clinical pharmacist to be in the future, we have clear cut exposure to the patients only because of the fact that our hospital is of a government sector and around 10,000 patients come to the hospital daily.
